ul.li: Memory Access: Sequential Scan (Hardware Prefetcher Friendly)
Space: $O(k)$ extra bytes for result accumulation
L1d Cache: Should fit 1 query vector + 1 target vector ($2 \times 4d$ bytes).
SIMD: AVX2 (256-bit) or AVX-512 (512-bit) supported for dot product/L2.
Prefetching: _mm_prefetch used to load cursor + 1 during compute(cursor).
Alignment: vector_v pointers must be 64-byte aligned for optimal SIMD loads.

g.title: Filters out tombstones sequentially via bitmask scan

g.text: distance_f32_avx512(a: *const f32, b: *const f32, d: usize) -> f32
g.title: Uses _mm512_fmadd_ps for dot product accumulation
Root contains LARGEST distance (worst candidate in top-k set)
Filters out tombstones sequentially via bitmask scan
Root contains LARGEST distance (worst candidate in top-k set)
